title: lomaria duplicata
intro: Lomaria duplicata, also known as the dual-leaved fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. Lomaria duplicata can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
